subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jazb
subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearnest for love! Raise thy plaintive cry from the depths of thy soul, that it may penetrate unto the spirit of the Beloved, and let tears flow from the eyes of the spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق عشق ناله از سر جان بکن تا در جان جانان موثر آید و گریه از چشم روح
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @presence of; reunion with God, @mystical themes
